Package fr.maif

Class FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • fr.maif.FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder

    FeatureCacheConfiguration

extends Object

    • Field Detail

      • serverSentEventKeepAliveInterval

        public Duration serverSentEventKeepAliveInterval

    • Method Detail

      • enabled

        public FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder enabled​(boolean val)
        Parameters:
        val - whether cache should be used (when possible) when querying feature activation status.
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withRefreshInterval

        public FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder withRefreshInterval​(Duration val)
        Parameters:
        val - Cache refresh interval, the cache will refresh all stored features at this interval
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • shouldUseServerSentEvent

        public FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder shouldUseServerSentEvent​(boolean val)
        Parameters:
        val - wether client should use SSE instead of polling to keep cache up to date. When using SSE, Izanami client will keep an http connection opened with Izanami backend, and get notified as soon as a feature is created / updated / deleted.
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • withServerSentEventKeepAliveInterval

        public FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder withServerSentEventKeepAliveInterval​(Duration val)
        Parameters:
        val - wether client should use SSE instead of polling to keep cache up to date. When using SSE, Izanami client will keep an http connection opened with Izanami backend, and get notified as soon as a feature is created / updated / deleted.
        Returns:
        updated builder

      • build

        public FeatureCacheConfiguration build()
        Build actual cache configuration
        Returns:
        a new FeatureCacheConfiguration with this builder values
